title: Introducing Automations: always-on coding agents
summary: Cursor introduced Automations, a feature for building always-on coding agents that run on schedules or trigger on events like Slack messages, Linear issues, GitHub PRs, and PagerDuty incidents. The agents can execute code-related tasks autonomously.
